Text.Page: If you're curious about those corpses over there, I killed them. They were Free Brotherhood.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Free Brotherhood?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Yeah, you haven't heard of them? They were farmers who banded together for fair prices from Velikan merchants for their crops. Then something happened...I don't know what. They're attacking anyone who gets close. It's like they're not the same people at all.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Someone else is controlling them?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>

Could be.

Maybe if we searched the bodies, we'd find some useful information...
(This corpse has an open chest wound. You can see something shiny inside.)

You found this inside one of them? I wonder what it could be.

I'll get it to the prefect as soon as I can.
